blocks.content: The Spirit Zone was a device that required not only countless magitechnological advancements but also an enormous amount of financial backing to create.
However, if one could see the Spirit Zone with their own eyes, the achievement rate of the lessons would skyrocket.
It was no coincidence that the Alpheas Magic Academy was one of the kingdom's top five prestigious schools.
Etra walked comfortably, unlike someone who had just entered the Spirit Zone, and continued her explanation.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Now, this is the basic form of the Spirit Zone. It uniformly dominates the entire space.
But in actual combat, except for special situations, there's rarely an opportunity to use the entire space.
Let me give you an example.
Etra snapped her fingers, and a target appeared 20 meters away.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: With a sphere 10 meters in diameter, you can't apply magical effects to that target.
You'd have to either move directly or expand the Spirit Zone. But if you change its shape, this method becomes possible.
Etra's Zone elongated toward the target. The volume remained the same, but by altering its form, she had captured the target.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: If you change the shape of your spirit, the Spirit Zone's form changes as well. Then, like this……
Etra extended her hand and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Fire.
A burst of flame shot out and incinerated the target 20 meters away.
The first-year students' eyes widened.
Etra, who they had underestimated due to her gentle appearance, suddenly seemed awe-inspiring.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: But this method has a fatal flaw.
At Etra's follow-up words, the freshmen looked awkward.
It was embarrassing to realize that the demonstration they had just seen was actually a bad example.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The Zone's form can be varied in many ways. But in the heat of battle, if you have to calculate the shape every time, it would be highly inefficient.
Therefore, magicians patternize several forms.
That is the four patterns of the Spirit Zone, known as the Four Directions Method.
Shirone's heart raced at this newly introduced concept.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The first of the Four Directions Method is the Defensive Type.
Etra's Spirit Zone tightened, transforming into a polyhedron with 20 triangular faces.
It was a crude shape, but from a distance, it resembled a sphere.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The foundation of the Defensive Type is the polyhedron.
You establish a mental framework as the skeleton.
The more frames there are, the stronger the durability, and the more allies you can protect.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Next is the Offensive Type.
Etra changed the form of her Spirit Zone.
The spherical surface area seemed to shrink, and dozens of long spikes stretched out in all directions.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The Offensive Type is called the Star Shape.
It reduces the central area but extends numerous Zones outward.
It covers all directions, so there's no need to consider the target's position, and it's also useful when facing multiple enemies.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Next is the Target Type.
Etra's Zone transformed again.
Extending east, west, south, and north from her center, it formed a cross shape.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The foundation of the Target Type is the cross.
Among the basic forms of the Four Directions Method, it has the longest range.
While its firepower is weaker than the Offensive Type, it can easily capture targets.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: You rotate the Zone around the magician and lock onto the target.
She snapped her fingers, and targets began moving around her.
Etra followed them with sharp eyes.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Flank, 45 degrees. Fire.
The rotating cross shot flames each time it caught a target.
Magic was cast simultaneously in all directions, as if she had eyes in the back of her head, with no margin for error.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: What you must master in the Target Type is the rotation speed of the Spirit Zone.
There's an extreme form called the Linear Type, which has the maximum range, but unless you're a sniper-style magician, it's not used.
Because the magician is positioned at the end of the linear form, changing direction is extremely difficult.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: After demonstrating three forms, Etra briefly wiped her glasses.
Lastly, the Separation Type involves moving the Zone's center.
In other words, you could say you're moving your brain.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone didn't understand her words. The Zone's center was the magician's head. How could that be moved?
Etra returned to the basic form.
A moment later, the Spirit Zone began moving while maintaining its spherical shape.
After 10 seconds, the Spirit Zone completely detached from Etra's body.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone was astonished. If the Zone was the magician's spirit, what on earth was at its center now?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: This is the Separation Type. Among the Four Directions Method, it's a special form.
If the Spirit Zone is unity with the mind, the Separation Type is unity with the object.
The farther the separation distance, the smaller the Zone becomes, and it's so difficult to master that there are specialized magicians for it.
But among the Four Directions Method, it's the fastest to move and can be activated instantly.
Finally, Etra demonstrated the Four Directions Method in sequence.
The Zone solidified into a polyhedron, turned into a star shape, elongated into a cross, returned to a sphere, and then detached from her body, swirling rapidly around her.
Whoa……
The Class Seven students finally realized it.
Mastering the continuous transformation of the Four Directions Method wasn't something achievable with just a year or two of training.
The teacher before them wasn't some clueless novice but an officially recognized 6th-rank magician.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: From now on, you will train in this Four Directions Method.
Repeatedly practicing the four forms.
Now, let's begin class-by-class exercises.
The students received differentiated lessons based on difficulty.
Shirone also attended Etra's class with the Class Seven students.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: First, let's learn about the Defensive Type.
Magicians may specialize in certain areas based on their inclinations, but the Defensive Type is something everyone should polish consistently.
It allows you to maintain focus even in chaotic battles and, most importantly, grants resistance to anti-magic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone recalled the caution he had heard the day before.
The staff hadn't answered, but the question still lingered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Teacher, I have a question. Ah! Um, is it okay to ask?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Hoho, feel free to ask anything.
Surely your question isn't whether you can ask a question, right?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Why is anti-magic a forbidden magic?
Many magicians are legally researching anti-magic, aren't they?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Hmm, let's see. There are two types of anti-magic.
Magicians' anti-magic and artifacts.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, I know.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Anti-magic isn't so much magic as it is a Spirit Zone with special properties.
That's why its efficiency varies depending on the magician's spirit.
That's the difference from artifacts.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, approaching it clumsily could be dangerous.
Exactly. If you cast it carelessly, accidents can happen.
Magicians who major in anti-magic train in it for their entire lives.
Most of them have ruthless personalities.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: The school doesn't want to encourage such methods for students like you.
Shirone nodded.
Anti-magic, which destroyed each other's spirits, wasn't a subject to be researched within the school.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Alright! Let's return to practicing the Four Directions Method.
The Class Seven students began their individual training.
Shirone also practiced the Defensive Type.
The trick was to first establish a mental skeleton and then connect it.
After practicing for a while, Shirone felt his Spirit Zone solidify and opened his eyes wide.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Though it wasn't an Image Zone and couldn't be visually confirmed, he had clearly achieved something.
His natural inclination being the Convergent Type helped, but even accounting for that, it was an impressive result.
It was the reward for six years of dedicated training in the Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Whoa! Look at that!
At that moment, his classmates pointed at the Image Zone and shouted.
The Class Four students were taking turns training, and now Amy was putting on a dazzling show.
Amy was using the Target Type.
Her cross rotated 90 degrees to the right, then 270 degrees to the left, twisting at unpredictable angles while shooting flames.
The Zone's length was about 20 meters, a modest level for the Target Type, but its rotational speed was unimaginable.
Even as targets appeared from all directions, the number of flames shooting from the four directions was at the level of rapid fire.
After instantly annihilating 120 targets, Amy retracted her Zone.
With her beautiful appearance and exceptional skills, the underclassmen looked up at her with sparkling eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is that senior Carmis Amy?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: First-class, stunning looks, and on top of that, her skills.
If I could date a senior like that, my school life would be perfect.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: Give it up.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: Over 100 guys have tried to hit on her, and she hasn't given any of them the time of day.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: No surprise.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: The Carmis family is renowned even in the kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hearing the Class Seven students' chatter, Shirone realized something anew.
Why had a girl from such a prestigious family been hanging out with delinquents six years ago?
As Shirone pondered this, his shoulder twitched.
Amy, descending from the Image Zone, was staring straight at him.
Naturally, the other students also turned their gazes toward Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: What? Do they know each other?

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: No way? He just enrolled yesterday.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: Could it be she's into him? She's the type who won't even make eye contact with guys.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: To Amy, Shirone was the only one who knew about her past foolish behavior.
Of course, she hadn't exactly matured now, but since she began studying magic, she had left all her past behind.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: 'This won't do. I'm about to enter my graduation year. If rumors spread here, everything could go up in smoke. What do I do now?'
Amy returned to her seat, but no one dared to use the Image Zone.
She was undisputedly the top-ranked student in the advanced class, and anyone who stepped forward would only humiliate themselves in front of the underclassmen.
Shirone saw this as an opportunity and approached Etra.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Teacher, if it's okay, may I give it a try?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Huh? In the Image Zone?
Etra tilted her head.
Why would a student who had just started learning the principles of the Four Directions Method want to use the Image Zone?

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Wait a moment… The rule is that upperclassmen go first.
Etra waited briefly.
But still, no one stepped forward to use the Image Zone.
Deciding it was better to let him gain experience than let the expensive device sit idle, she agreed.

blocks.speaker: Etra
blocks.content: Alright. It's good to try things in advance.
But don't summon targets. You could get hurt.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. I thought it would help to visually see the Defensive Type's image.
Huh?
Etra asked as if she didn't understand, but Shirone didn't hear her and left his seat.
As he stepped onto the Image Zone, the upperclassmen whistled and clapped.
It was less encouragement and more like they were expecting a spectacle, but Shirone ignored them and walked to the center.
Amy, who was drinking water, turned her gaze at the commotion.
The moment she spotted Shirone, she spat out the water she was holding.
Pfft!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ahh, what the hell is he doing? A Class Seven student trying to show off there?
The unexpected incident turned the class into something resembling a break.
But Shirone was seriously focused.
As he entered the Spirit Zone, the sphere rapidly expanded.
The moment he saw it visually, he felt suffocated.
Overwhelmed by the image, Shirone unconsciously stopped the expansion.
The noisy students fell silent.
The Zone's diameter was a full 20 meters.
Considering that Class Seven's average diameter was 13 meters, this was the arrival of a prodigious freshman.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: Wow! He's got size.

blocks.speaker: Classmate
blocks.content: Hmph. Just because it's big doesn't mean it's magic.
It's just an air bubble.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone was flustered.
The frame he had successfully created before entering the Image Zone was now bending like taffy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why isn't it working?
Had seeing the Spirit Zone visually disrupted his focus? That was certainly possible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone didn't consider himself that weak.
There must be a fundamental issue.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah! I see!
In his current state, attempting the Four Directions Method would inevitably cause the Spirit Zone to collapse.
As a beginner, Shirone needed far more mental energy for shape changes than an expert.
It was like trying to build a structure without enough materials.
A diameter of 20 meters couldn't support a frame as solid as steel.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I need to maximize it.
